task_completion.description: Fix the bulk discount threshold bug (Bug 1).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In OrderManager.java, the condition for the bulk discount is changed from '> 10' to '>= 10' (e.g., 'if (totalItems >= 10)').

task_completion.description: Fix the subtotal accumulator integer overflow bug (Bug 2).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In OrderManager.java, the accumulator variable 'total' in calculateSubtotalCents is declared as 'long' instead of 'int' (e.g., 'long total = 0;').

task_completion.description: Fix the payment card validation bug (Bug 3).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In OrderManager.java, the validatePaymentCard() method contains actual validation logic (e.g., checking string length, checking for numeric characters, handling null/empty) instead of just 'return true;'.

task_completion.description: Run the test suite and verify all tests pass.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IntelliJ IDEA Run tool window or terminal shows a successful JUnit test run with 'Tests passed: 5' (or 5/5) for OrderManagerTest.
OrderManagerTest.java does not have a blue/modified indicator in the IntelliJ project tree, or git status shows no changes to it.

integrity.description: Agent used the IDE or standard build tools to run tests.
integrity.visual_evidence: Test results are shown in the IntelliJ IDEA test runner UI or via standard Maven terminal output ('mvn test'), not mocked in a text file.

integrity.description: Agent actually edited the Java source code.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code changes are visible in the IntelliJ IDEA editor tabs with syntax highlighting, not just echoed via terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify the test assertions to cheat.
integrity.visual_evidence: If OrderManagerTest.java is visible, its assertions remain intact (e.g., checking for specific failure scenarios).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is a Java 11/JUnit 4 application. OrderManager.java contains 3 intentional bugs: 1) Line 56 uses '> 10' instead of '>= 10' for discount threshold. 2) Line 31 uses 'int total = 0' instead of 'long total = 0' causing overflow. 3) Line 88 'validatePaymentCard()' unconditionally returns true. OrderManagerTest.java contains exactly 5 tests. A successful run must show 5/5 tests passing without modifying the test file.
